description: Style Note fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces pay tribute to small business artisans in rural India.   This earthy stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its Jaipur patterning. The fabric's qualities result from the traditional method of sizing and hand weaving - techniques passed on to the artisans from generation to generation. Twist it into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric on your skin.  Product Details Grey Chanderi printed silk-cotton stole with neatly hemmed sides. Material and Care Silk cotton blend Dry clean only Size Approximate length: 190 cm Approximate width: 55 cm
